    @allure.title("PATCH /api/v1/chat/message/{room_id}/read-all/ - idempotent (double call safe)")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.NORMAL)
    def test_read_all_messages_idempotent(self, auth_headers):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that calling read-all twice does not cause errors
        """
        with allure.step("Send first PATCH request"):
            url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/v1/chat/message/{ROOM_ID}/read-all/"
            first_resp = requests.patch(url, headers=auth_headers)
>           assert first_resp.status_code == 200
